name: Grilled Salisbury Steak in Belmont Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and shape into 6 individual small steaks, about 3/4 inch thick.
2. Sprinkle with seasoned flour and brush with olive oil.
3. Broil the steaks for 5 to 6 minutes on each side, or longer until desired degree of doneness is reached.
4. Prepare the Belmont Sauce by melting butter and combining the remaining ingredients. Blend well.
5. Stir in 2 tablespoons sherry wine and bring almost to a boiling point.
6. Arrange the steaks on a hot platter and pour the sauce over them.
